title: Add swipeable product photos with Lookout button linking to Meesho

requirements.summary: Add the two uploaded Attack on Titan t-shirt product images as static assets
acceptanceCriteria: Both uploaded images are saved in frontend/public/assets/generated
Images are accessible via relative paths from the frontend

file_operations.description: Add the first Attack on Titan t-shirt product image (brown variant with front/back view) to the generated assets directory
Add the second Attack on Titan t-shirt product image (beige variant with front/back view) to the generated assets directory

requirements.summary: Implement a swipeable photo interface for the Attack on Titan t-shirt images with stacked vertical layout
acceptanceCriteria: Photos are displayed in a stacked vertical arrangement
Swiping left/right or up/down transitions between the two photos
Swipe gestures work on both touch and mouse interactions
Visual feedback indicates which photo is currently active

file_operations.description: Create a new swipeable gallery component specifically for the two Attack on Titan t-shirt images. Use the existing useSwipeGesture hook from frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeGesture.ts for swipe detection. Implement a stacked vertical layout where one image appears below the other, with smooth transitions on swipe. Support both touch and mouse drag gestures. Include visual indicators (dots or image counter) to show which photo is currently active. Reference the exact asset paths: frontend/public/assets/generated/ms_qjphs_512_418433256.jpg and frontend/public/assets/generated/ms_cblw2_512_418433257.jpg. Use the useImageLoader hook for loading states and skeleton loaders during image load.

requirements.summary: Add a 'Lookout' button that redirects to the Meesho affiliate link
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Lookout' button is visible on or near the swipeable photo interface
Clicking the button opens the exact Meesho affiliate URL in a new tab
Button has clear, accessible styling consistent with the app design
URL parameters are preserved exactly as provided

file_operations.description: Add a 'Lookout' button to the AttackOnTitanGallery component. Position the button prominently below or overlaying the swipeable images. On click, open the exact Meesho affiliate URL in a new tab: https://www.meesho.com/af_invite/234223027:instagram_stories:2007896?p_id=418433257&ext_id=6x4h61&utm_source=instagram_stories. Use target='_blank' and rel='noopener noreferrer' for security. Style the button consistently with the app's warm neutral design system using Tailwind classes. Ensure all URL parameters are preserved exactly as provided.

requirements.summary: Integrate the Attack on Titan swipeable gallery into the ProductBrowse page
acceptanceCriteria: The swipeable interface is accessible to users through the app navigation or prominent placement
Integration follows existing layout patterns and styling
Loading states are handled appropriately for the product images

file_operations.description: Import and integrate the AttackOnTitanGallery component into the ProductBrowse page. Add it as a new section after the hero section or alongside existing promotional sections (MeeshoProductSection, WatchProductSection). Wrap it in a container with appropriate spacing and styling that matches the existing layout patterns. Include a section heading like 'Featured: Attack on Titan Collection' or similar. Ensure the component follows the page's responsive grid layout and warm neutral color scheme.
